items.title: Democratic Senate candidates clash over data centers in latest debate
items.dek: U.S. Rep. Haley Stevens and Abdul El-Sayed offered contrasting views on data center development during the Michigan U.S. Senate debate, with clips highlighting affordability concerns and corporate influence.

items.title: Citizens Research Council evaluates data center economic impact
items.dek: A new report examines how large data centers affect Michigan's tax base and local economies amid growing development.

items.title: University expert highlights community resistance to data centers
items.dek: Debates over water, power and local control continue as AI demand drives new proposals across the state.

items.title: Data centers advance rapidly as regulators scramble for rules
items.dek: Across the U.S., officials race to impose guardrails on power-hungry facilities while communities push back on incentives and impacts.
